creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166415
svn diff to fix net-im/pidgin-manualsize (patch)

This port is currently marked BROKED (not fetchable)
The svn diff attached to this pr;

provides *working* MASTER_SITES
adds LICENSE
takes MAINTAINER

That's it!
